creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Hi

Five section 8 manual pages at <https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/auto-admin/#pkg-plist>. 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=auto-admin&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports#SEE_ALSO> lists nine section 8 pages. 

At a glance, the two with broken links (a separate bug) do not exist when the breakage is worked around: 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=auto-filesys-manager&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports> for auto-filesys-manager(8)

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=auto-services-manager&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports> for auto-services-manager(8)
